RT @dataproofer: Now that my command line functionality has been improved, what new languages should I learn next? https://t.co/2rpA91LdFb
We want to keep growing Dataproofer so that is easier to catch data mistakes and anomalies early in the data analysis process. If you use R, give it a try. https://t.co/58OJP3pa4C

We are lucky enough to have received an incredibly smart contribution I never would have thought to do: @nicucalcea got Dataproofer to work in R, so its easier for more people to proof their datasets as part of their analysis workflow. This is what Open Source is about!

Earlier this year @newsroomdev and I worked on updating @dataproofer by stripping out the Electron app and focusing on the command line experience, and it is already paying off. One of the dreams of writing Open Source software is that other people will build on your work.
